allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const m=html.match\(/<script[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\); if\(m\) m.forEach\(\(s,i\)=>{ const code=s.replace\(/<\\/?script[^>]*>/g,''\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\('Script block '+i+': OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Script block '+i+': '+e.message\); } }\);")
